definition_origin: The doctrine that 'the first 3-5 onboarding screens must mirror the ad creative the user just clicked' was crystallized by Mau Baron's 2024-2025 Starter Story playbook (Prayer Lock, scaling from $40K/mo to $150K/mo with this principle as load-bearing). Adapty High-Performing Paywall 2026 codified the framework as 'creative-onboarding semantic continuity' and identified it as a top-3 lever for paywall conversion (alongside localization and trial-vs-direct). Spark Ads (TikTok creator-sourced ads, launched 2021) provide the production engine: ads are sourced from real creators (UGC), cut to ~15s vertical, and the onboarding flow inherits the creator's framing, vocabulary, and emotional register. The pattern inverts the older 'generic onboarding' default where ad creative and in-app first-impression were independently designed — Mau Baron's quote: 'What happens in the 5 screens before the paywall determines whether it converts — not the paywall design itself.'
core_mechanism: Three mechanisms. (1) SEMANTIC CONTINUITY — the user's brain has loaded a context from the ad creative (visual style, claim, voice, emotional register) in the 15-30 seconds before tap. The first onboarding screen extends or breaks that context. Continuity = trust + reduced cognitive load (no re-orientation needed). Break = distrust + 'this isn't what was advertised' bounce. (2) PROMISE ↔ DELIVERY MATCHING — ad shows 'lose 10 lbs in 30 days with AI macro plan' → onboarding asks weight goal in screen 2, delivers AI macro plan at screen 30. The promise made in the ad is delivered in the onboarding climax. Mismatched promises (ad shows 'AI prayer for grief' but onboarding asks 'what's your astrological sign') destroys conversion. (3) VARIANT ROUTING — ad-id passed via deep-link param routes user to ad-matched onboarding variant. User clicked the 'mom-of-two stress relief' creative → onboarding variant uses that voice and questions; user clicked the 'productivity bro' creative → different variant. Mau Baron's funnel runs 8-15 onboarding variants matched to ad-creative themes simultaneously. Conversion lift: Mau Baron documented +25-40% organic-cohort conversion when first 3 screens mirror ad; Spark Ads cut CPA roughly in half for Prayer Lock.
neuroscience_correlate: Priming — anterior temporal cortex semantic priming network. Ad creative loads concepts into accessible memory; onboarding screen 1 either confirms (smooth retrieval, low ACC conflict) or violates (high ACC conflict, attention re-orientation, abandonment risk). Theory-of-mind / source attribution — TPJ engages when continuity is preserved (same 'voice' from ad to app); breaks when voice mismatches (creator → corporate copy).
empirical_evidence: Mau Baron Starter Story playbook (https://www.starterstory.com/mou) — Prayer Lock case study: scaling from $40K/mo to $150K/mo correlated with implementing creative-onboarding alignment + Spark Ads pipeline + 5-15min story onboarding. Mau Baron quote: 'as long as it's adding value and telling a story, the longer the better' AND 'What happens in the 5 screens before the paywall determines whether it converts — not the paywall design itself.' Adapty High-Performing Paywall 2026: top-performers run 14.7 paywall experiments per year — but Adapty's 2026 Spark Ads + creative analysis identifies onboarding-creative alignment as having higher LTV impact than paywall A/B alone. Spark Ads platform data (TikTok 2023-2024): UGC creator-sourced ads see 53% higher engagement and 30-40% lower CPA vs brand-produced ads in mobile-app advertising. Adapty 2026 case-study (Mau Baron Prayer Lock): variant-routed onboarding from Spark Ad-id passthrough produces +25-40% conversion lift on attributed cohorts vs single-variant onboarding. Phiture 2024 cross-app analysis: ad creative ↔ onboarding semantic alignment is in the top 5 high-impact UX levers for paid-acquisition apps. RevenueCat 2025-2026: top-performing apps have ad-attribution-aware paywall experiments; ad_variant property in PostHog / Amplitude / Mixpanel is a baseline expectation.
measurable_outcome_metric: ad_to_onboarding_continuity_score (qualitative + quantitative — voice/visual/claim match), per-ad-variant onboarding_completion_rate, per-ad-variant paywall_conversion_rate, per-ad-variant 12mo cohort LTV, ad_id_passthrough_capture_rate (% of installs with ad_id correctly captured), variant_routing_match_rate (% of users routed to matching variant).
evidence_strength: case_study + practitioner_opinion (Mau Baron + Adapty 2026) + industry_benchmark (Spark Ads platform data)
conversion_lift_benchmark: +25-40% conversion lift on creative-aligned cohorts (Mau Baron Prayer Lock case study, attributed cohorts vs control). Spark Ads cut CPA roughly in half (~50% reduction) in Mau Baron's funnel. +53% engagement, -30-40% CPA for UGC creator-sourced ads vs brand-produced (TikTok Spark Ads platform data 2023-2024).
engineering_tactics: Pipeline: (1) Source UGC via Spark Ads (TikTok), Meta Ads Manager creator-sourced campaigns, OR direct creator partnerships ($100-500 per video for indie). (2) Each ad variant has unique ad_id and creative_theme tag (e.g., mom_stress_relief, productivity_bro, gen_z_anxiety). (3) Deep-link configuration: ad campaign URL = https://app.example.com/install?ad_id={ad_id}&theme={creative_theme}; install attribution captures ad_id (Branch / Adjust / AppsFlyer / Apple Search Ads attribution). (4) Onboarding state machine reads ad_id at first launch, queries variant routing config (feature flag in PostHog or server-driven UI from JSON: { ad_id_X: { onboarding_variant: 'mom_stress', screens: [...], copy_overrides: {...} } }). (5) Onboarding screen 1-3 inherit ad's voice + visual theme + claim. (6) Telemetry: every event tagged with ad_id + ad_variant + creative_theme — enables per-creative funnel analysis in PostHog. Server-driven UI is the architectural enabler (item 31): without it, each ad-variant onboarding requires app store re-submission. Implementation pattern (RN + PostHog + Branch): const adData = await Branch.getLatestReferringParams(); const variant = await posthog.getFeatureFlag('onboarding_variant', { ad_id: adData.ad_id }); const screens = await fetchVariantConfig(variant); navigation.navigate('Onboarding', { screens, theme: adData.creative_theme }). Multi-variant production: 5-15 simultaneous variants via Spark Ad rotation; iterate weekly.
real_world_examples: 1) Prayer Lock (Mau Baron, $150K/mo) — 8-12 simultaneous onboarding variants matched to Spark Ad creative themes (grief, anxiety, faith-renewal, family-prayer); first 3 screens mirror ad's emotional opening; AI prayer reveal at climax delivers ad's promise. 2) Cal AI — onboarding variant routing based on Meta Ad creative (weight-loss vs muscle-gain vs maintenance ads route to different question sequences and different macro-plan reveal framing). 3) Noom — multiple ad variants (psychology-of-eating vs habit-tracking vs scientific-method) route to onboarding variants matching framing. 4) Headway — book-summary ads with specific titles (e.g., Atomic Habits) route to onboarding variant featuring that book first. 5) Lensa AI — Magic Avatars ad with anime style routes to anime-themed onboarding; Cyberpunk style to cyberpunk-themed onboarding. 6) Replika — emotional-support ad creative routes to companion-focused onboarding voice; productivity ad creative routes to mentor-voice onboarding. 7) Tinder Gold — 'Meet someone within 1 mile' ad routes to local-focus onboarding. 8) Photoroom — product-photo ad routes to e-commerce-focused onboarding; portrait-edit ad to selfie-focused.
mobile_vs_web_diffs: Mobile-primary. Spark Ads is TikTok-mobile-only; Meta Ads work on mobile + web but mobile installs dominate. Apple Search Ads (App Store) attribution via SKAdNetwork (privacy-preserving); ad_id passthrough works through Branch / Adjust / Apple Custom Product Pages. Web equivalent: ad-source attribution via UTM params + URL deep-linking. Mobile install attribution complicated by ATT (item 47) and SKAdNetwork conversion-window constraints; web has clearer attribution but lower install-volume.
platform_design_language_alignment: Ad creative typically uses casual / authentic / creator-voice aesthetic (UGC = anti-corporate look). Onboarding inheriting this means departing from generic SaaS-look (no Inter, no indigo-500, no Lucide trinity — directly aligned with anti-AI-slop discipline). Liquid Glass / M3 Expressive provide the premium-feel substrate while content (typography choice, voice, photography) carries the creator-themed personality.
category_fit: STRONG: AI-wrapper (Lensa, Photoroom, Cal AI, Prayer Lock — all rely on UGC creative pipelines), wellness/habit (Noom, Headspace, Calm), edtech (Headway, Blinkist), social (Tinder, Bumble), photo/video editor (Photoroom, VSCO). WEAK: B2B productivity (Notion, Linear — different acquisition channels), fintech (regulatory/compliance constrains UGC framing), kids/family (COPPA prohibits creator-targeted advertising to minors).
solo_dev_feasibility: 1_month for full pipeline. ~1 week server-driven UI architecture (item 31 dependency). ~1 week ad-id passthrough + Branch/Adjust integration. ~1 week first 3-5 onboarding variants production (creator partnerships + variant copy). ~1 week telemetry + PostHog dashboard + iteration loop. Solo-dev shortcut: launch single onboarding variant with one-creator partnership; add variants after first $5K MRR. Dependencies: Branch/Adjust ($0 free tier; paid $1K+/mo for advanced), TikTok Spark Ads ($100+/day budget), creator partnerships ($100-500/video indie rate), server-driven UI infrastructure.
tooling_options: Spark Ads (TikTok native; creator-sourced ad management). Meta Ads Manager Creator Marketplace. Branch / Adjust / AppsFlyer for install attribution + ad_id passthrough. Apple Search Ads + SKAdNetwork conversion (privacy-preserving). PostHog feature flags for variant routing (free tier). Server-driven UI: Lovi / custom JSON config + remote-config (Firebase / LaunchDarkly / RevenueCat experiments). UGC sourcing: Billo, Backstage, Twirl, JoinBrands ($50-300 per video). Internal: simple creator partnership outreach via TikTok DM ($100-500 indie rate).
ai_dependency: optional. AI can assist in (1) generating variant copy for onboarding screens to match ad theme (LLM rewriter), (2) classifying ad creatives by theme for routing logic, (3) producing initial creative scripts for creators to film. Not required — the pipeline works with manual variant authoring.
claude_design_application: Prompt fragment 1: 'Build the variant-routed onboarding state machine in React Native. Read ad_id from Branch.getLatestReferringParams on first launch; query PostHog feature flag onboarding_variant with property ad_id; load variant config from server-driven UI JSON: { variant_id: "mom_stress", screens: [...], theme_tokens: { hero_image: "mom_calming_baby.jpg", typography: "Cabinet Grotesk + Manrope", voice: "warm caregiver register", paywall_promise: "5-min daily peace ritual" }, copy_overrides: { screen_1_headline: "You are not alone in this overwhelm.", screen_2_question: "What feels heaviest right now?" } }. First 3 onboarding screens MUST mirror the ad creatives voice + visual + emotional register. Forbid: generic Inter + indigo-500 corporate-onboarding when ad was UGC-creator-voice. Telemetry: every event tagged with ad_id + variant_id + creative_theme.' Prompt fragment 2: 'Generate one variant onboarding flow matching the mom_stress Spark Ad: hero image of softly-lit mom + sleeping baby; headline Cabinet Grotesk 28pt: You're not failing. You're tired. Subhead Manrope 16pt: One 5-minute ritual. Tonight. Question 1: What part of motherhood feels heaviest? (4 options matching ad themes). Question 2-5 build sunk-cost. Screen 6: AI-generated personalized 5-min ritual reveal — delivers the ad promise.'
stitch_application: Prompt fragment 1: 'Generate the first 3 onboarding screens for a wellness app whose ad creative was a UGC TikTok of a mom whispering to her baby at 2am with overlay text I didnt know motherhood would feel this hard. Screen 1: full-bleed hero image of mom + baby in soft warm light, headline Cabinet Grotesk 28pt left-aligned You are not alone in this. Subhead Manrope 16pt: One ritual. Five minutes. Tonight. CTA Lets begin 56pt height filled brand-accent. Screen 2: question What feels heaviest right now? 4 options as cards (overwhelm / exhaustion / loneliness / guilt). Screen 3: social proof 5,247 mothers found peace this week with creator-voice testimonial inline. Forbid: generic Inter + indigo-500, corporate onboarding voice, stock-photo rep, Lucide icons. Use UGC-aesthetic photography + Cabinet Grotesk + Manrope.' Prompt fragment 2: 'Generate the variant matching a productivity-bro ad creative (different voice entirely): Cabinet Grotesk 28pt aggressive left-aligned Stop wasting your peak hours. Subhead Manrope 16pt: A 12-min daily plan that compounds. Same architectural shell, completely different voice + photography + question framing.'
ai_codegen_failure_mode: AI defaults: (1) Single generic onboarding variant for all ad sources — loses 25-40% creative-aligned cohort lift. (2) Generic SaaS look (Inter + indigo-500 + Lucide trinity) regardless of ad creative voice — destroys semantic continuity. (3) No ad_id capture in deep-link handler — variant routing impossible. (4) Stock-photo hero images instead of UGC-aesthetic creator photography. (5) Corporate-voice onboarding copy after creator-voice ad — mismatches Theory-of-Mind expectations. (6) Server-driven UI architecture absent — every variant requires app re-submission. Counter-prompt: 'Variant-routed onboarding REQUIRED: capture ad_id via Branch/Adjust deep-link, route to ad-matched variant via PostHog feature flag + server-driven UI JSON config. First 3 onboarding screens MUST mirror ad creatives voice + visual + emotional register. Forbid Inter, indigo-500, generic Lucide icons, stock photography. Use Cabinet Grotesk + Manrope + creator-aesthetic photography. Telemetry: every event tagged with ad_id + variant_id + creative_theme.'
anti_patterns: 1) Generic onboarding for all ad sources (loses 25-40% creative-aligned conversion). 2) Voice mismatch (creator-voice ad → corporate onboarding copy). 3) Visual mismatch (UGC ad aesthetic → generic SaaS look). 4) Promise ↔ delivery mismatch (ad promises X, onboarding delivers Y). 5) Missing ad_id passthrough (variant routing impossible). 6) Without server-driven UI (every variant = app store cycle = unviable). 7) Stock photography instead of UGC-aesthetic. 8) Single variant claim (e.g., '5-min ritual') universal across ad themes — limits Spark Ads creative pool. 9) Creator-targeted advertising to minors (COPPA + UK Children's Code violation).
regulatory_risk: MEDIUM. UGC ads with health/wellness/fitness claims must comply with FTC ad-substantiation standards (no unsupported '10 lb in 30 days' claims). EU DSA Article 26 — ad transparency requirements. UK ASA — testimonial substantiation rules. EU DFA Q4 2026 — manipulative personalization based on inferred vulnerability flagged (e.g., targeting depressed users with mental-health ad creative is risk). UK Children's Code Standard 13 — nudge techniques to under-18s. ATT Framework (item 47) — IDFA collection requires consent.
platform_constraints_2026: Apple Search Ads + SKAdNetwork (privacy-preserving install attribution; ad_id passthrough via Custom Product Pages or Branch). Apple ATT Framework (item 47) — IDFA requires consent. Meta Ads + Spark Ads — comply with Apple ATT and SKAdNetwork. Google Privacy Sandbox for Android (in development) — similar privacy-preserving attribution. App Store Guideline 5.1.1(v) — data minimization in onboarding.
accessibility_implications: Variant-routed onboarding must each independently meet WCAG 2.2: 4.5:1 contrast on overlaid hero images (text + image combination commonly fails contrast — use semi-transparent overlay scrim if needed). VoiceOver: hero image alt-text (descriptive, not 'image'). Dynamic Type 200% — variant copy must reflow gracefully. Reduce-motion: replace hero image entrance animation with crossfade.
pitfalls_caveats: 1) Spark Ads creative pool requires constant refresh (TikTok creative fatigue ~7-14 days); variant authoring becomes ongoing work. 2) ATT consent rate (~43.9% iOS / 81.5% Android per item 47) limits ad_id passthrough — variant routing falls back to default variant for non-consented users. 3) SKAdNetwork conversion-window constraints (24-48h on iOS) limit attribution depth. 4) Creator licensing — ensure UGC creator content is licensed for derivative use in onboarding (not just ad). 5) Brand consistency vs creative variance — too much variance breaks trust; too little loses alignment lift. 6) Server-driven UI bundle complexity (item 31). 7) Variant testing requires statistically-significant cohort sizes — small apps may not have enough installs per variant.
cross_cultural_validity: Spark Ads + UGC creator pipelines work strongly in US, EU, LATAM, SEA. JP / KR markets prefer professional-produced ads over UGC (cultural preference for polish). CN: Douyin (TikTok CN) Spark Ads equivalent strong; UGC pipeline well-developed. RTL markets: creator-voice authenticity translates; layout mirroring required.
prescribed_action: Build a variant-routed onboarding pipeline with ad_id passthrough. (1) Source UGC creative via TikTok Spark Ads (or Meta Creator Marketplace) — 5-10 simultaneous creator-voice ads matching different audience themes. (2) Each ad has unique ad_id + creative_theme tag. (3) Branch/Adjust install attribution captures ad_id; React Native onboarding state machine reads at first launch. (4) PostHog feature flag routes to variant config (server-driven UI JSON). (5) First 3 onboarding screens MUST mirror ad creatives voice + visual + emotional register. (6) AI plan reveal at climax delivers ad's promise. (7) Telemetry: every event tagged with ad_id + variant_id + creative_theme — per-creative funnel analysis. Iterate variants weekly. Expected lift: +25-40% creative-aligned cohort conversion (Mau Baron case study); CPA -30-50% (Spark Ads platform).
master_prompt_relevance: 06_monetization_compliance (primary), 04_implementation (server-driven UI + ad_id routing), 02_design (variant-specific aesthetic + voice), 05_telemetry (per-creative funnel), 01_psychology (semantic continuity + theory-of-mind).
questionnaire_relevance: Questionnaire screens are a major customization surface — first 1-3 questions must match ad framing (mom-stress ad → 'what feels heaviest' question; productivity-bro ad → 'where do you waste your peak hours' question). Question framing is voice + register choice, not just data collection.
aha_relevance: Aha = ad's promise delivered. AI plan reveal at climax must concretely fulfill what the ad showed (5-min ritual / personalized macro plan / AI prayer / Magic Avatars). Mismatch between ad promise and Aha delivery = funnel breaks.
telemetry_events: ad_id_captured (ad_id, ad_source, creative_theme), onboarding_variant_assigned (variant_id, ad_id), onboarding_step_viewed_per_variant, paywall_view_per_variant, paywall_conversion_per_variant, ad_promise_delivered_at_aha (creative_theme, plan_reveal_payload), per_creative_12mo_LTV (server-side cohort).
measurement_horizon: Day 0 (per-variant onboarding completion + paywall conversion), Day 7-30 (per-variant retention), 12mo cohort LTV per ad-variant (the only honest metric — some variants convert high but churn fast).
emotional_archetype_alignment: All 12 archetypes can map to creative variants — the framework demands archetype-specific variants. Magician variants (transformation), Caregiver variants (warm support), Hero variants (commitment journey), Outlaw variants (anti-establishment), Jester variants (playful surprise), Sage variants (informed wisdom), Lover variants (connection), Innocent variants (simple promise), Explorer variants (discovery), Creator variants (self-expression), Ruler variants (status), Everyman variants (relatable struggle). MISMATCH: forcing a single archetype voice across all variants kills Spark Ads creative pool diversity.
anti_pattern_paired: Pairs against: Generic Onboarding for All Ad Sources, Voice Mismatch (creator → corporate), Promise/Delivery Mismatch, Missing Ad_id Passthrough, Stock Photography substitute. Aligns with: Story Onboarding Doctrine (item 18, Mau Baron framework), AI Plan Reveal (item 12, delivers ad promise), Cross-Step Personalization Stitching (item 14), Server-Driven UI (item 31), Onboarding Localization (item 36, multi-variant).
